Dataset Name: OzFlux Daily Meteorological and Flux Data
Description: Raw daily timeseries of precip, solar rad, relative humidity, wind speed, and eddy covariance fluxes for all 17 sites.
Usage in Manuscript: Input boundary conditions for Stochastic Soil Water Model (SSWM) simulation.

Description: Fitted soil capacity, porosity, sand and clay fractions parsed from global SoilGrids.
Usage in Manuscript: Constrains active root-zone depth and soil water holding capacities.

Dataset Name: Robson Creek Predawn & Midday Leaf Water Potential
Description: Observed predawn and midday leaf water potentials (MPa) at Robson Creek (rainforest).
Usage in Manuscript: Used to validate simulated stomatal closure stress thresholds (s*).

Description: Measured percentage loss of conductivity (PLC) vulnerability curves for Robson Creek species.
Usage in Manuscript: Used to validate calibrated hydraulic traits (P50/Pg50).

Dataset Name: Cow Bay Predawn & Midday Leaf Water Potential
Description: Observed predawn and midday leaf water potentials (MPa) at Cow Bay (tropical rainforest).
Usage in Manuscript: Used to validate simulated stomatal closure stress thresholds (s*).

Description: Measured percentage loss of conductivity (PLC) vulnerability curves for Cow Bay species.
Usage in Manuscript: Used to validate calibrated hydraulic traits (P50/Pg50).

Description: MCMC calibrated values of swilt, s*, and Emax under PT forcing (Best Fit model).
Usage in Manuscript: Benchmark empirical calibration parameters for baseline scenario.

Description: MCMC calibrated values of swilt, s*, and Emax under PT forcing (Eco-Evolutionary Optimality model).
Usage in Manuscript: Optimality-calibrated trait distributions for baseline scenario.

Description: MCMC calibrated values of swilt, s*, and Emax under Top-5 Ensemble PET forcing (Best Fit model).
Usage in Manuscript: Benchmark empirical calibration parameters for ensemble study.

Description: MCMC calibrated traits under Top-5 Ensemble PET forcing (Eco-Evolutionary Optimality model).
Usage in Manuscript: Optimality-calibrated trait distributions for ensemble study.

Description: Comparative statistics (NSE, Energy performance) between BF and OPT under PT forcing.
Usage in Manuscript: Populates Table 1 of the baseline manuscript.

Description: Comparative statistics (NSE, Energy performance) between PT and Ensemble forcing configurations.
Usage in Manuscript: Populates Table 1 of the ensemble manuscript.

Description: Zipped archive containing preprocessed daily forcing time series (*_data.csv, *_gs_data.csv) and parameter files (*_params.pickle) for all 17 sites.
Usage in Manuscript: Required input boundary conditions to run MCMC parameter estimations.

Description: Parameter calibrations (swilt, s*, Emax) representing vegetation adaptation shifts under El Niño and La Niña meteorological conditions.
Usage in Manuscript: Evaluates parameter shift dynamics across contrasting ENSO climate phases.

Description: Zipped archive containing all LaTeX files, intermediate build logs, and high-resolution figures for the baseline PT study.
Usage in Manuscript: Reference LaTeX compilation tree for baseline paper.

Description: Zipped archive containing LaTeX source, compiled output tables, and diagnostic plots for the Top-5 Ensemble study.
Usage in Manuscript: Reference LaTeX compilation tree for ensemble paper.

Description: Zipped archive of the entire ENSO sub-study, including individual site calibration results, plotting scripts, and the final report.
Usage in Manuscript: Reference directory containing all data and figures for El Niño vs. La Niña parameter analyses.

Description: Zipped archive containing Cow Bay and Robson Creek sap flux, soil water potentials, TERN validation data, and processing notebooks.
Usage in Manuscript: Validation datasets used to verify hydraulic thresholds and sap velocity shifts.

Description: Zipped archive containing potential evapotranspiration (PET) evaluations across 41 OzFlux sites, including daily timeseries comparisons, performance matrices, and the compiled cross-validation PDF report.
Usage in Manuscript: Comparative baseline supporting the selection of Top-5 consensus PET forcings.

Description: Zipped archive containing footprint processing scripts, slurm queue files, GUI utilities, and site-by-site NetCDF footprint climatologies.
Usage in Manuscript: Footprint analysis validation to define the representativeness and fetch of eddy-covariance data.

Description: Zipped archive containing 357 annual site-level quality-control reports in PDF format generated via PyFluxPro.
Usage in Manuscript: Quality control verification for the long-term eddy-covariance forcing datasets.

Description: Zipped archive containing 90 PDF and LaTeX files detailing variables, instrumentations, and site-specific metadata for the L6 quality control levels.
Usage in Manuscript: Metadata documentation backing the physical parameters used for each site calibration.

Dataset Name: L6 Yearly Split Site Diagnostic Reports (Yearly_Split_Plots.zip)
Description: Zipped archive containing 351 annual validation and data compliance reports in PDF format for the L6 dataset splits.
Usage in Manuscript: Data check reports verifying seasonal cycles and annual splits for model inputs.

Description: Zipped archive containing the site-specific soil moisture sensor placement diagrams and report generator code.
Usage in Manuscript: Documentation of soil profile sensor configurations to calibrate depth-weighted soil moisture indices.
